title: Decompose a procedural LiveView into live view + function components
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/profile_page_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ProfilePageLive) that decomposes a profile page into a LiveView + three stateless function components: <.profile_header user={@user} />, <.profile_stats stats={@stats} />, <.profile_posts posts={@posts} />. Define the three components in the same file at the bottom (all under MyAppWeb.ProfilePageLive namespace, using `use Phoenix.Component` in a helper module or inline). mount/3 assigns :user, :stats, :posts. Keep the LiveView render small — just a composition of the three components.
tier_rationale: Multi-component decomposition decision. Requires correct separation of LiveView vs stateless.
